title: Sock's Light Client Pack
description: The perfect pack to enjoy a cute and simple Minecraft experience with friends. Works on servers, and is a great addition to SMPs.
body:
# **Overview**
This pack is meant for players who have low end devices, but still want to enjoy a crisp and cute minecraft experience with friends. It includes a maximum of 20 mods, 5 resource packs, and a singular shader pack to give the player a smooth yet lively playing experience.

![Player Look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/056d8370a3345fe9aeba48dcb015242179bb4691.png)

# **Features**

## _Long Distance Play_
Because of the e4mc mod, you can open your worlds to friends across the world without having to pay for server hosting.

## _Player Presence_
With a combination of 3D Skin Layers, Chat Heads, and Not Enough Animations, the players in the world feel more alive and recognizable.

## _Animations_
EMF and ETF allow this pack to utilize Fresh Moves, and Fresh Animations to give all the mobs and players of the world some much needed liveliness.

## _Performance_
With mods like Sodium and Lithium, etc the pack is easily able to run on many low end devices even with shaders.

## _Shaders_
This pack uses Miniature Shaders to get a nice simple and clean look to the world for you to play in and enjoy.
